channel.title: Rishabh Singh — ML & AI Blog
channel.description: Writing on AI, Machine Learning, Python & Web Development by Rishabh Singh, Data Scientist & IIT Madras Graduate.

item.title: Transformers in a Minute
item.description: A concise explanation of the Transformer architecture — attention, encoders, decoders, and why it changed AI.

item.title: Forecasting in a Minute
item.description: Time series forecasting explained — trends, seasonality, and modern inline forecasting approaches.

item.title: List vs Set in a Minute
item.description: Python Lists vs Sets — performance comparison, Big O complexity, and when to use each.

item.title: SVMs & Kernel Trick in a Minute
item.description: Support Vector Machines and the Kernel Trick explained concisely — margin maximization, RBF kernels, and classification.

item.title: Scalars, Vectors, Matrices & Tensors Explained
item.description: Linear algebra fundamentals for deep learning — understanding scalars, vectors, matrices, and tensors.

item.title: CNNs Explained — Convolutional Neural Networks in a Minute
item.description: How CNNs work — convolution, pooling, feature maps, and image classification in plain English.

item.title: Multiclass vs Multilabel Classification Explained
item.description: The difference between multiclass and multilabel classification problems with ML examples.

item.title: Confusion Matrix & Metrics Explained
item.description: Precision, Recall, F1 Score, and the Confusion Matrix — what they mean and when to use them.

item.title: Bayesian Learning Explained
item.description: Bayes Theorem, prior, posterior, and likelihood — Bayesian inference for machine learning.

item.title: Linear Regression Explained — Cost Function, Gradient Descent
item.description: Linear Regression from scratch — cost function, gradient descent, and the math behind predictions.

item.title: Lazy Loading vs Eager Loading — Web Performance
item.description: How lazy loading improves Core Web Vitals, reduces bandwidth, and enhances perceived performance.

item.title: CORS in Flask — Bridging Frontend and Backend
item.description: How to configure CORS in Flask for cross-origin API requests from a frontend.

item.title: HTTP Methods — Enhancing Web Communication
item.description: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH — HTTP methods explained for REST API design.

item.title: Sets Performance Better vs Lists — Why?
item.description: Why Python sets outperform lists for membership testing — hash tables, O(1) lookups explained.

item.title: Support Vector Machine (SVM) — Explained
item.description: SVM from scratch — hyperplanes, margins, support vectors, and scikit-learn implementation.

item.title: Understanding if __name__ == "__main__" in Python
item.description: What if __name__ == "__main__" means in Python, why it matters, and how to use it correctly.

item.title: Flask Session for Login — User Authentication
item.description: Implementing login sessions in Flask — cookies, secret keys, and session management.

item.title: Conda Virtual Environment & Commands
item.description: Essential Conda commands for creating, managing, and exporting Python virtual environments.

item.title: requirements.txt in Python — Package Version Management
item.description: How to create, use, and pin dependencies in requirements.txt for reproducible Python environments.

item.title: Python Virtual Environment — Introduction
item.description: Getting started with Python virtual environments — venv, pip, and project isolation.

item.title: Convert Python Program to exe — PyInstaller & auto-py-to-exe
item.description: How to convert a Python script to a standalone Windows executable using PyInstaller.

item.title: Python Program for Matrix Multiplication — 3 Methods
item.description: Three ways to multiply matrices in Python — nested loops, list comprehension, and NumPy.
